# Christine Cheong

> Data Science Educator teaching students and working professionals to understand,
> apply, and communicate data science in real-world contexts.

## Pages

- /: Home — who Christine is, who she works with, why learn with her
- /about: About — her story, teaching philosophy, and background
- /articles: Articles — practical writing on data science and education
- /courses: Courses — programmes for university students and executive education participants
- /contact: Contact — how to reach Christine for course enquiries and opportunities

## About Christine

Christine Cheong is a Data Science Lecturer at NUS-ISS. She teaches data science across
university and executive education settings, with a focus on practical application and
clear communication of complex concepts. Her students range from undergraduates building
analytical foundations to senior executives making data-driven decisions.

## Contact

christinecheong88@gmail.com
